view.title: Validate explicit UC need #9

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 9 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for an audit trail with IP address and timestamp.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for an audit trail with IP address and timestamp.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of an audit trail that includes IP addresses and timestamps, as specified in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence of such an audit trail. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of direct evidence supporting this requirement.
